channel.name: 🚨-general-alerts-weekly-swing-and-day-trades  [cross-channel filtered]
channel.topic:
For day traders looking to follow how I typically trade during market hours.
I typically size up on swing trades and not day trades but I will say something to the effect of, "GO BIG" if I'm sizing up on weekly options as opportunities do arise on all timeframes

messages.content:
@Day Trades 
decently sized trade on 
$NKE jan 75c @ $3 

i'm going to do this with commons myself but i like the trade. 
it's the old Ackman sold, time to buy move like $NFLX. 
Also has a good technical low

@Day Trades 
On the spacex news $GOOGL has a stake. 
If 320 holds look for a move into 325 for next week. 

$SATS 16JAN 135C is the other mover in this "space" along with the other known names such as $ASTS $RKLB etc. 
On $SATS target is 118 for first scale out and second scale out is 135 for runners. 

$GSAT is another one that we use to own in the commons port before selling for near a double. 
I like this name for a push into 84 with 68 being support/ risk level.

@Day Trades 
Oh one more and you may want to do these as commons. 
Keep an eye on this $Q 20mar 115c
This name has been on a rampage lately and could be completing a base breakout over the 105 level.
Earnings is on the 27th
